blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,134 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 24.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
